title: 50cm Hollow Narrow Glass Lily Vase – Clear Round Bottom Glass Wedding Table Centerpiece Display
features: Elegant 50 cm height – This tall yet slender lily-style glass vase creates an impressive focal point on tables, altars or display surfaces, without taking up excessive width.
Premium clear mouth-blown glass – Crafted with high clarity and smooth finish, the hollow narrow design showcases stems beautifully and adds sophistication to arrangements.
Round-bottom stable base – The unique round-bottom design adds visual interest and ensures stability when used with decorative weights or sand for event settings.
Versatile décor use – Ideal for weddings, church displays, banquet centres, home décor and florist use. Use individually or in groups for dramatic effect.
Easy to style & reuse – Mix with fresh or artificial flowers, fairy lights, or floating candles. Simple to clean and perfect for seasonal or repeat event use.
description: Enhance your décor with the sophisticated style and versatility of the Floralcraft 50 cm Hollow Narrow Glass Lily Vase. Designed for elegance and ease of use, this tall, slender vase features a smooth mouth-blown clear glass finish and a round-bottom base that adds visual appeal while maintaining functionality. The 50 cm height makes it perfect for table centrepieces at weddings, corporate events or home gatherings — giving height without dominating the table. Its hollow narrow body highlights floral stems and decorative fillers beautifully, whether you choose long lilies, hydrangea bunches or slender branches. With its clear finish and minimalist form, this vase complements any décor theme — from classic white weddings to rustic barn receptions to modern home displays. It can be used alone for understated elegance, or grouped together for impact. Fill it with water and flowers, sand and candles, or even fairy lights to create your desired effect. Built with durability and reusability in mind, the Floralcraft vase is easy to clean and store, making it a smart investment for florists, event planners and home entertainers alike.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Displaying flowers in various settings including weddings, homes, and churches
